TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ni-ke-lowMa-ci-ya-wi-liŚįľŚŹĮÁĺÖ¬∑ť¶¨ŚüļšļěÁ∂≠Śą©, title = Ni-ke-lowMa-ci-ya-wi-liŚįľŚŹĮÁĺÖ¬∑ť¶¨ŚüļšļěÁ∂≠Śą©, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ni-ke-lowMa-ci-ya-wi-liŚįľŚŹĮÁĺÖ¬∑ť¶¨ŚüļšļěÁ∂≠Śą©} }

S.FORM: ŚįľŚŹĮÁĺÖ¬∑ť¶¨ŚüļšļěÁ∂≠Śą©(śĄŹŚ§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Niccol√≤ Machiavelli,1469ŚĻī5śúą3śó•‚ÄĒ1527ŚĻī6śúą21śó•), . Ni-ke-low.Ma-ci-ya-wi-li (I-ta-li a kamu, Niccol√≤ Machiavelli, 1469 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 3 a demiad katukuh i 1527 a mihcaan 6 abulad 21 a demiad), ci Ni-ke-low. Ma-ci-ya-wi-li han, I-ta-li, sibalucu'ay tu cen-ce atu migingkiway tu namekan. 1469 a mihcaan nilecuhan i I-ta-li a Bow-low-lun-sa. u nizatengan pasu u Ma-ci-ya-wi-li a nizatengan. . i teban nu lasubu a mihcaan tu kasumamada mingikiway tu cence, u saayaway mahapinangay mialesay ciniza tu nu sen-sye atu lun-li-sya apikelec, sakay cence-sye atu ba-sye patadas tu sateked siye-ke a zazan. sabaliucu' u kaka ku kanatal sa ciniza, u tatungus nu kanatal mala u angangan nu hulic, tungusay nisulitan "Hungti a nizatengan" angangan musakamu tu nu Hungtiay, u Hungti a izaw ku canacanan a sakatatungus atu tineng, huntu hicaen miala atu amitanektek a situngus mikuwan. u tatenga'ay nu ayzaay a nizatengay tu cen-ce, anganga a patizengay tu nu tademawan. hekal nu ziday ,1527ŚĻī6śúą22śó•ŚéĽšłĖ,šļęŚĻī58ś≠≤. Ma-cu-ya-wi-li i 1469 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 3 a demiad nilecuhan i Bow-low-lun-sa, 1527 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 22 a demiad mapatay 58 a mihcaan ku nikauzip. u niyazu' niza i Bow-low-lun-sa atu I-ta-liay nu uzuma a niyazu' i 14 atu 15 lasubu a mihcaan mala u misakakuay nilaculan nu saayaway mulangaway a kakitizaan, i kacumelakan nu misulita nalimaan a mihcaan, u lalangawan nalimaan niza kalahadan kacakatan malilid ku hamin nu Ow-cow. nika I-tali a cen-ce sakaput mahiza tu caay piliyas tu nu Hungtiay a pikuwan, Mi-lan a kanatal, Wi-ni-s u masakaputay kapulungan a kanatal, Bow-low-lun-sa masakaputay mapulungan a kanatal, Na-pow-li a kowang atu satalakaway nu tinsikiw a sakuwan, lima ku angangan a kanatal, izaw henay yadah ku adidi'ay nu Hungtiay a kakitizaan, a paahebal tu lala' a munday miliyung tu pakulisiwanay a hitay matenesay a masangangayaw, katukuh i 1453 a mihcaan makaketun tu Low-ti a katatelek a pahezek. Ma-ci-ya-wi-li itini i I-tali u kazakedan a mihcaad a lecuhan, Malaki, katukuh pitekaan milihiza tu cen-ce a kawaw, nuayawan nikauzip niza itiza i Bow-low-lun-sa u macakatay a ziday,u cumelakan nu misulitay nalimaan a mihcaan, zikuz a nikauzip i Ba-kow tu Si-pang-ya a kanatal ku eneng i I-tali mababekel ngangayawan a ziday,"makay Ke-si-mu.te.emey-ti-ci i 1434 a mihcaan a situngus mikuwan. katukuh i baian a suna niza ci Pi-ay-low.Te. Me-ti-ci i 1494 a mihcaan milaliw, i 60 a mihcaan u kacakatay a ziday nu Bow-low-lun-sa. cen-ce a nikauzipan . Ma-ci-ya-wiy-li a cen-ce a kawaw, namakayza i 1493 a mihcaan katukuh i 1512 a mihcaan, atu Bow-low-lun-sa amasakaputay kapulungan a kanatal muliyaw patizeng atu masasupacuk caay kutulas, uyni a kamu, makay nuyaanay mikuwanay a sakaput Mey-ti a luma'an mapasumad nu kiwkayay u siw-ni tu ci Sa-wo-lu-la ku mikeliday tu binawlan palekal amibahbah nazikuzan, katukuh Mey-ti-ci a luma'an muliyaw manukas atu pikuwana dimiad. i 1494 a mihcaan tatenga'an tu midebung ku waliay a lasubu a mihcaan Ba-kow Ca-li, namahiza I-ta-li mabiyalaw tu midebungay kalalecad ku kangelu'an a ziday.
S.PHON: *********(****:ni ¶ ¶or~…ĺ* ma ¶ńßia*…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺi,********************), . ni-k…ô-r~…ĺow.ma- ¶i-ja-wi-r~…ĺi (i-ta-r~…ĺi a kamu, ni ¶ ¶or~…ĺ* ma ¶ńßia*…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺi, **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad), ¶i ni-k…ô-r~…ĺow. ma- ¶i-ja-wi-r~…ĺi ńßan, i-ta-r~…ĺi, sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô atu migiŇčkiwaj tu nam…ôkan. **** a mińß ¶aan nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i i-ta-r~…ĺi a bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa. u nizat…ôŇčan pasu u ma- ¶i-ja-wi-r~…ĺi a nizat…ôŇčan. . i t…ôban nu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan tu kasumamada miŇčikiwaj tu ¶…ôn ¶…ô, u saajawaj mańßapinaŇčaj miar~…ĺ…ôsaj ¶iniza tu nu s…ôn-sj…ô atu r~…ĺun-r~…ĺi-sja apik…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶, sakaj ¶…ôn ¶…ô-sj…ô atu ba-sj…ô patadas tu sat…ôk…ôd sij…ô-k…ô a zazan. sabar~…ĺiu ¶u Ē~ ° u kaka ku kanatar~…ĺ sa ¶iniza, u tatuŇčus nu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, tuŇčusaj nisur~…ĺitan "ńßuŇčti a nizat…ôŇčan" aŇčaŇčan musakamu tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj, u ńßuŇčti a izaw ku ¶ana ¶anan a sakatatuŇčus atu tin…ôŇč, ńßuntu ńßi ¶a…ôn miar~…ĺa atu amitan…ôkt…ôk a situŇčus mikuwan. u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj nu ajzaaj a nizat…ôŇčaj tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, aŇčaŇča a patiz…ôŇčaj tu nu tad…ômawan. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu zidaj ,************,*****. ma- ¶u-ja-wi-r~…ĺi i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa, **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mapataj ** a mińß ¶aan ku nikauzip. u nijazu Ē~ ° niza i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa atu i-ta-r~…ĺiaj nu uzuma a nijazu Ē~ ° i ** atu ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u misakakuaj nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu saajawaj mur~…ĺaŇčawaj a kakitizaan, i ka ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan nu misur~…ĺita nar~…ĺimaan a mińß ¶aan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nar~…ĺimaan niza kar~…ĺańßadan ka ¶akatan mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku ńßamin nu ow- ¶ow. nika i-tar~…ĺi a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô sakaput mańßiza tu ¶aaj pir~…ĺijas tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj a pikuwan, mi-r~…ĺan a kanatar~…ĺ, wi-ni-s u masakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ, bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa masakaputaj mapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ, na-pow-r~…ĺi a kowaŇč atu satar~…ĺakawaj nu tinsikiw a sakuwan, r~…ĺima ku aŇčaŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ, izaw ńß…ônaj jadańß ku adidi Ē~ °aj nu ńßuŇčtiaj a kakitizaan, a paańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a mundaj mir~…ĺijuŇč tu pakur~…ĺisiwanaj a ńßitaj mat…ôn…ôsaj a masaŇčaŇčajaw, katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan makak…ôtun tu r~…ĺow-ti a katat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk a pańß…ôz…ôk. ma- ¶i-ja-wi-r~…ĺi itini i i-tar~…ĺi u kazak…ôdan a mińß ¶aad a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, mar~…ĺaki, katukuńß pit…ôkaan mir~…ĺińßiza tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawaw, nuajawan nikauzip niza itiza i bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa u ma ¶akataj a zidaj,u ¶um…ôr~…ĺakan nu misur~…ĺitaj nar~…ĺimaan a mińß ¶aan, zikuz a nikauzip i ba-kow tu si-paŇč-ja a kanatar~…ĺ ku …ôn…ôŇč i i-tar~…ĺi mabab…ôk…ôr~…ĺ ŇčaŇčajawan a zidaj,"makaj k…ô-si-mu.t…ô.…ôm…ô-ti- ¶i i **** a mińß ¶aan a situŇčus mikuwan. katukuńß i baian a suna niza ¶i pi-aj-r~…ĺow.t…ô. m…ô-ti- ¶i i **** a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw, i ** a mińß ¶aan u ka ¶akataj a zidaj nu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa. ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a nikauzipan . ma- ¶i-ja-wij-r~…ĺi a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawaw, namakajza i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan, atu bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-sa amasakaputaj kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ mur~…ĺijaw patiz…ôŇč atu masasupa ¶uk ¶aaj kutur~…ĺas, ujni a kamu, makaj nujaanaj mikuwanaj a sakaput m…ô-ti a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mapasumad nu kiwkajaj u siw-ni tu ¶i sa-wo-r~…ĺu-r~…ĺa ku mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu binawr~…ĺan par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ amibańßbańß nazikuzan, katukuńß m…ô-ti- ¶i a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an mur~…ĺijaw manukas atu pikuwana dimiad. i **** a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇča Ē~ °an tu mid…ôbuŇč ku war~…ĺiaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan ba-kow ¶a-r~…ĺi, namańßiza i-ta-r~…ĺi mabijar~…ĺaw tu mid…ôbuŇčaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an a zidaj.
S.FORM: ŚįľŚŹĮÁĺÖ¬∑ť¶¨ŚüļšļěÁ∂≠Śą©(śĄŹŚ§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Niccol√≤ Machiavelli,1469ŚĻī5śúą3śó•‚ÄĒ1527ŚĻī6śúą21śó•), . Ni-ke-low.Ma-ci-ya-wi-li (I-ta-li a kamu, Niccol√≤ Machiavelli, 1469 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 3 a demiad katukuh i 1527 a mihcaan 6 abulad 21 a demiad), ci Ni-ke-low. Ma-ci-ya-wi-li han, I-ta-li, sibalucu'ay tu cen-ce atu migingkiway tu namekan. 1469 a mihcaan nilecuhan i I-ta-li a Bow-low-lun-sa. u nizatengan pasu u Ma-ci-ya-wi-li a nizatengan. . i teban nu lasubu a mihcaan tu kasumamada mingikiway tu cence, u saayaway mahapinangay mialesay ciniza tu nu sen-sye atu lun-li-sya apikelec, sakay cence-sye atu ba-sye patadas tu sateked siye-ke a zazan. sabaliucu' u kaka ku kanatal sa ciniza, u tatungus nu kanatal mala u angangan nu hulic, tungusay nisulitan "Hungti a nizatengan" angangan musakamu tu nu Hungtiay, u Hungti a izaw ku canacanan a sakatatungus atu tineng, huntu hicaen miala atu amitanektek a situngus mikuwan. u tatenga'ay nu ayzaay a nizatengay tu cen-ce, anganga a patizengay tu nu tademawan. hekal nu ziday ,1527ŚĻī6śúą22śó•ŚéĽšłĖ,šļęŚĻī58ś≠≤. Ma-cu-ya-wi-li i 1469 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 3 a demiad nilecuhan i Bow-low-lun-sa, 1527 a mihcaan 6 a bulad 22 a demiad mapatay 58 a mihcaan ku nikauzip. u niyazu' niza i Bow-low-lun-sa atu I-ta-liay nu uzuma a niyazu' i 14 atu 15 lasubu a mihcaan mala u misakakuay nilaculan nu saayaway mulangaway a kakitizaan, i kacumelakan nu misulita nalimaan a mihcaan, u lalangawan nalimaan niza kalahadan kacakatan malilid ku hamin nu Ow-cow. nika I-tali a cen-ce sakaput mahiza tu caay piliyas tu nu Hungtiay a pikuwan, Mi-lan a kanatal, Wi-ni-s u masakaputay kapulungan a kanatal, Bow-low-lun-sa masakaputay mapulungan a kanatal, Na-pow-li a kowang atu satalakaway nu tinsikiw a sakuwan, lima ku angangan a kanatal, izaw henay yadah ku adidi'ay nu Hungtiay a kakitizaan, a paahebal tu lala' a munday miliyung tu pakulisiwanay a hitay matenesay a masangangayaw, katukuh i 1453 a mihcaan makaketun tu Low-ti a katatelek a pahezek. Ma-ci-ya-wi-li itini i I-tali u kazakedan a mihcaad a lecuhan, Malaki, katukuh pitekaan milihiza tu cen-ce a kawaw, nuayawan nikauzip niza itiza i Bow-low-lun-sa u macakatay a ziday,u cumelakan nu misulitay nalimaan a mihcaan, zikuz a nikauzip i Ba-kow tu Si-pang-ya a kanatal ku eneng i I-tali mababekel ngangayawan a ziday,"makay Ke-si-mu.te.emey-ti-ci i 1434 a mihcaan a situngus mikuwan. katukuh i baian a suna niza ci Pi-ay-low.Te. Me-ti-ci i 1494 a mihcaan milaliw, i 60 a mihcaan u kacakatay a ziday nu Bow-low-lun-sa. cen-ce a nikauzipan . Ma-ci-ya-wiy-li a cen-ce a kawaw, namakayza i 1493 a mihcaan katukuh i 1512 a mihcaan, atu Bow-low-lun-sa amasakaputay kapulungan a kanatal muliyaw patizeng atu masasupacuk caay kutulas, uyni a kamu, makay nuyaanay mikuwanay a sakaput Mey-ti a luma'an mapasumad nu kiwkayay u siw-ni tu ci Sa-wo-lu-la ku mikeliday tu binawlan palekal amibahbah nazikuzan, katukuh Mey-ti-ci a luma'an muliyaw manukas atu pikuwana dimiad. i 1494 a mihcaan tatenga'an tu midebung ku waliay a lasubu a mihcaan Ba-kow Ca-li, namahiza I-ta-li mabiyalaw tu midebungay kalalecad ku kangelu'an a ziday.

ba-kow ¶a-r~…ĺi, namańßiza i-ta-r~…ĺi mabijar~…ĺaw tu mid…ôbuŇčaj kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °an a zidaj.
